description:
The ReqView example project is open showing the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document. Find all requirements containing the term 'monitor' and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/monitoring_report.txt.

The report must follow this EXACT format:

Search Term: monitor
Total Matches: <number of visible requirements>

Matching Requirements:
<ID>: <First sentence or line of description>
<ID>: <First sentence or line of description>
...

Example line: 'SRS-15: The system shall monitor the battery voltage.'

Include all requirements matching the search term.
